overall.description: A third-person perspective follows a woman in a green dress through a futuristic cyberpunk city environment. The character ascends neon-lit staircases and walks through commercial plazas filled with giant digital billboards, transitioning from enclosed pink-lit walkways to open dusk-lit areas with palm trees. The footage is clearly from a video game (Cyberpunk 2077) with high-quality ray-traced lighting and detailed futuristic architecture.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway with pink neon ceiling

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the covered neon-lit walkway toward a large staircase ahead

entered.detail: overhead structure with glowing pink neon lights illuminating the walkway
large curved wall with multiple digital advertisements and glowing graphics
tall digital display showing various advertisements and brand logos
wide staircase leading upward between modern glass buildings

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a covered pedestrian walkway bathed in pink neon light. The reflective floor mirrors the glowing ceiling above, while digital billboards line both sides. Ahead, a wide staircase leads upward into the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: outdoor staircase between commercial towers with shifting neon accents

events.description: ambient lighting shifts from pink to cyan-blue neon as character ascends the staircase
character passes several pedestrians descending the stairs while continuing upward

agents.ego_description: climbing the wide concrete staircase, moving from the pink-lit lower section toward the blue-lit upper area

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in yellow jacket descending the stairs toward the camera

entered.detail: metal handrails with glowing cyan accent lights running along the left side
metal handrails with glowing cyan accent lights running along the right side
large digital sign displaying 'KENDACHI' in bright white letters against dark background
glass and metal canopy structure visible at the top of the stairs

segments.scene_description: The character ascends the wide staircase flanked by glowing cyan railings. The lighting transitions from pink to blue as she climbs higher. Other pedestrians walk down the stairs in the opposite direction, and a large 'KENDACHI' billboard becomes visible on the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: upper plaza with police department signage and digital advertisements

events.description: exits staircase into covered upper plaza area with benches and the Night City Police Department billboard
lighting brightens with more natural dusk light as character approaches the open plaza exit

agents.ego_description: walking through the upper plaza past benches and other pedestrians, heading toward the open-air section

notable_agents.action: man sitting on bench looking at a device in his hands
man in blue jacket and hat walking toward the camera

entered.detail: large black digital sign reading 'NIGHT CITY POLICE DEPARTMENT' with directional arrows
modern benches with people sitting along the left wall
overhead structure providing partial cover over the plaza walkway

segments.scene_description: Reaching the top of the stairs, the character enters a covered plaza featuring the Night City Police Department billboard on the left wall. People sit on benches nearby while others walk through. The space transitions from enclosed to open as natural dusk light becomes visible ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: open-air commercial plaza with palm trees and giant digital advertisements

events.description: exits covered structure into open plaza with palm trees, natural dusk sky, and towering glass buildings
character turns slightly right toward a second staircase leading to an upper level

agents.ego_description: walking across the open plaza toward a second staircase, passing large food advertisements and palm trees

entered.detail: tall palm tree in planter box marking the open plaza area
massive colorful advertisement showing food items with 'BUY 2 GET 1 FREE' text
tall modern building with reflective glass facade visible in the background
second wide staircase leading up to an upper commercial level with signage

segments.scene_description: The character emerges into an open-air plaza bathed in natural dusk light. Palm trees and massive digital billboards dominate the space, with a modern glass tower rising in the background. She walks toward a second staircase on the right side of the plaza.

scene_state.functional_zone: outdoor staircase leading to upper commercial level with restaurant signage

events.description: begins ascending second staircase toward building entrance with neon signage

agents.ego_description: climbing the second staircase toward a building entrance with 'Hacienda' signage and glowing neon accents

entered.detail: illuminated sign for 'Hacienda' restaurant above the staircase entrance
large white 'SEC' letters on the building facade to the left of the stairs
metal railings with glowing cyan lights lining the second staircase

segments.scene_description: The character ascends the second staircase, leaving the open plaza behind. Neon lighting returns as she approaches the 'Hacienda' entrance at the top, with 'SEC' signage visible on the left building facade and glowing railings lining the steps.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a neon-lit urban corridor that transitions from enclosed pink walkways into an open dusk plaza before ascending back into a glowing commercial district. It begins in a covered pedestrian walkway bathed in pink neon light with reflective floors, moving forward toward a wide staircase. As the character ascends the stairs, the lighting shifts from pink to blue, passing other pedestrians and a large KENDACHI billboard before reaching a covered plaza featuring a Night City Police Department sign. The scene then opens from this enclosed space into an open-air plaza filled with natural dusk light, palm trees, and a towering glass skyscraper. Finally, the camera follows the character up a second staircase, leaving the natural light behind as neon signage and the Hacienda entrance reappear at the top.
